name: Honey Glazed Pork Shoulder
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly rub the pork shoulder with a mixture of salt, seasoned salt, garlic powder, black pepper, and M.S.G.
2. Place the fat-side up on a rack in a shallow pan.
3. Roast at 325°F for 40 minutes per pound until it reaches an internal temperature of 185°F as measured by a meat thermometer.
4. Remove the skin and score the fat in a diamond pattern.
5. Pour the mixture of honey, ginger, and horseradish over the scored fat.
6. Return to the oven and roast for 20 minutes longer until well-glazed.
